t_ch: 为什么会想到保障非人生物权益？
t_en: Why do you want to protect the rights and interests of non-human creatures?

t_ch: 问得很好！只有理清了行动的本真理念，才会达成真正的互相理解。
t_en: Good question! Only by understanding the motives behind the actions can mutual understanding be truly achieved.

t_ch: 在空间站的无数奇物藏品中，生命其实不止存在于人类这个载体。
t_en: Among the countless Curio collections of the space station, life does not only exist in the human receptacle.

t_ch: 它们经常会栖息于一些人类想不到的地方——比如一张桌子，或者一个杯子。
t_en: They often inhabit places that humans can't imagine — such as a table or a cup.

t_ch: 然而，仅仅是因为它们的外形，并不为人类所普遍认识，它们的生命就不被重视了！
t_en: However, just because their appearances are not understood by humans, their lives are not valued!

t_ch: 何等荒谬？生命岂能因为外显的形式不同，就出现高低贵贱之分呢？
t_en: How ridiculous? How can anyone segregate life into different levels just because of their external forms?

t_ch: 正因如此，我决定成立拟态保护协会，去保障非人生物的各项权益。
t_en: For this very reason, I decided to establish the Mimicry Protection Association to protect the rights and interests of non-human creatures.

t_ch: 作为拟态保护协会会长，你做过些什么？
t_en: What have you done as the president of the Mimicry Protection Association?

t_ch: 我势单力薄，影响力或许会让你失望。
t_en: I am powerless on my own. My influence may disappoint you.

t_ch: 但是我敢用自己的灵魂发誓，我从未在这件事上有所懈怠。每一天，我都在为了推广拟态保护协会而努力！
t_en: But I swear on my soul that I never treated this matter with any less importance. Every day, I work hard to promote the Mimicry Protection Association!

t_ch: 除了像是现在这样招募志同道合之士外，我还在闲暇之余撰写了《废除机器人奴役法案》。虽然还是草稿，但是框架已经初步成型。
t_en: Other than recruiting like-minded people like now, I also compiled the Robot Slavery Abolition Act. Although it is only a draft, I've got the preliminary framework set up.

t_ch: 相信未来，我们一定可以改变这个冰冷的现状！
t_en: Have some faith in the future. I'm sure we can change this cold-blooded status quo!

t_ch: 空间站其他人对于你的行为怎么看待？
t_en: What are the other people's perspectives on your actions?

t_ch: 很遗憾，这里的科员大多数是一些自私之辈。他们过分关注眼前短浅的利益，升职加薪一类的事情更值得他们去付出心血。
t_en: Unfortunately, most of the researchers here are selfish. They care too much about short-term interests. They are more willing to put their efforts into things like promotion and salary.

t_ch: 实不相瞒，我也老实说吧。他们认为我的想法过于天真烂漫、不切实际。
t_en: I'll be honest with you. They think my idea is premature and unrealistic.

t_ch: 但好在偶尔会有几个同你一样的知音出现，让我有信心坚持在这一条正确的道路上。
t_en: But fortunately, once in a while I meet people like you who share the ambition. It gives me faith to stick to the right path.

t_ch: 没有什么问题了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 虽然交流时间不长，但我能感受到，你已经领悟了我想要表达的所有含义。
t_en: Although we didn't chat long, I can feel that you already understood everything I try to express.

t_ch: 希望以后我们可以为了非人生物的权益，做出更多的努力！
t_en: I hope we can make more efforts in protecting the rights and interests of non-human creatures in the future!

t_ch: 好久不见！要不要看看我的新雕刻？这个石头的材质可是很特殊的！
t_en: It's been a while! Do you want to see my new carvings? The texture of this rock is very special!

t_ch: 而且，我的技术也得到了进步，现在的雕刻，越来越像她本人啦！
t_en: My craftmanship has been improved. My carvings look more and more like her!

t_ch: 还有些事想问你…
t_en: I've got something to ask you.

t_ch: 莱斯莉多久会回来呢？
t_en: When will Lesley come back?

t_ch: 这个……我也说不准。毕竟本琥珀纪，只有她一个人有幸前往丰饶星域。
t_en: Well... I'm not sure. After all, she's the only lucky one who got to visit the Abundance Segmentum in this Amber Era.

t_ch: 不过在那个地方，她每日沐浴神眷，与优秀的同事一起完成科考，一定比在空间站要更加幸福开心。
t_en: However, she is bathed in divine blessings every day over there. She must be much happier doing research with other outstanding researchers over there than staying on the space station.

t_ch: 既然对莉莉而言，是幸福的体验，那时间长一些，也是一种享受吧？
t_en: Since it's such a great experience for Ley, I'm sure she'll enjoy it if she gets to stay for longer.

t_ch: 你喜欢莱斯莉吗？
t_en: Do you like Lesley?

t_ch: 这…这不是明摆着的嘛！莉莉就是我认定的那个女孩了……
t_en: Isn't it obvious? Ley is the one...

t_ch: 只可惜，我还没有正式完成对她的告白。
t_en: Unfortunately, I haven't officially confessed my love for her.

t_ch: 不过也好，这样我就有更多的时间去追求她，并等待她的回应啦！
t_en: It's good though. That way I can have more time to pursue her and wait for her response!

t_ch: 隔壁科室的混蛋是谁？
t_en: Who are the scoundrels from the department next door?

t_ch: 他们啊？一帮来找麻烦的流氓而已！
t_en: Those people? They are just a bunch of hooligans looking for trouble!

t_ch: 科室与科室之间本就研究方法不同，有些时候发生学术冲突很正常。但总是有人喜欢对人不对事，阴阳怪气不说还跑过来欺负人。
t_en: Different departments adopt different research methods. Academic conflict is normal. But some people just take things too personally and come harass other people.

t_ch: 所以我经常会教训教训那帮臭小子！看他们还敢不敢再来找地概科室的麻烦！
t_en: That's why I often teach them a good lesson! I'll see if they still dare to look for troubles at the Department of Cosmic Geography!

t_ch: 没有什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 倒也不打扰。来个人和我说说话，换换心思也好。
t_en: You didn't bother me. It's good to have someone talk to me and distract me.

t_ch: 毕竟，总不能一直惦记着莱斯莉，对吧？
t_en: After all, I shouldn't keep thinking about Lesley, should I?

t_ch: 又是你？这次又想问些什么？先告诉你，我可是很忙的。神启的消息还需要我去探索调查！
t_en: You again? What do you want to ask this time? I'm very busy! I need to investigate the divine message!

t_ch: 我有些事情想问你…
t_en: I have a few questions for you...

t_ch: 你是想要打破喝咖啡的记录吗？
t_en: Are you trying to break the record for drinking coffee?

t_ch: 你…你怎么知道？难道说你已经听说了那个女人的故事？
t_en: How... How did you know that? Have you heard about the story of that woman?

t_ch: 也难怪，种子岛那边的人嘴巴一天到晚叭叭不停，动不动就吹嘘什么「莱斯莉的十一杯畅饮咖啡」神话。
t_en: Why am I surprised? People on Seed Isle never shut up. They keep bragging about the legend of Lesley's <unbreak>11</unbreak> Cups of Coffee.

t_ch: 她莱斯莉能做到的，我埃美丽也能做到，而且会做的比她更强、更好！
t_en: Whatever Lesley can do, I can do it too. And I will do it even better!

t_ch: 关于莱斯莉。
t_en: About Lesley.

t_ch: 我是那位年轻有位的星神学者莱斯莉的妹妹，目前在密卷科担任科员，我叫埃美丽。
t_en: I'm the younger sister of Lesley the prodigy Aeon scholar. I am Emily. I currently work as a researcher at the Department of Insight.

t_ch: 希望你可以独立地认识我，不要和其他人一样，老是把我和那个女人扯上关系。
t_en: I hope you can get to know me as an independent individual, instead of associating me with that woman, like everybody else.

t_ch: 我只不过比她晚出生一些日子，但无论是才学还是实践，我都比她强。
t_en: I was only born a bit later than her. I am better than her no matter in talent or practice.

t_ch: 只要能给我一个相同的机会，我一定也能在空间站留下属于我的传说……
t_en: As long as I am given the same opportunity, I'm sure I will be able to create my own legend on the space station...

t_ch: 还是关于莱斯莉。
t_en: Still about Lesley.

t_ch: 你烦不烦？想要了解她的情况，你在哪儿都可以问到，何必来烦我？
t_en: Come on, seriously? If you are so interested in her, you can get her information everywhere. Why are you bothering me?

t_ch: 整个空间站，或许就是我最不愿意提起她了！你可真是哪壶不开提哪壶！
t_en: She's the last person I want to talk about on the entire space station! You are really asking the wrong person!

t_ch: 不过我还是要警告你：不要对莱斯莉有什么多余的想法。
t_en: But I have to warn you. Don't you try to take advantage of her.

t_ch: 到处打听关于她的事情，多半没什么好心思。你最好注意些，别让我发现你的阴谋诡计。
t_en: What good intention could you possibly have by asking around about her? You better watch out. Don't let me find out your scheme.

t_ch: 没什么需要继续问的了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 算你识相。以后少来管教我，也不要到处打听关于莱斯莉的消息。
t_en: That's a wise thing to do. Leave me alone. And stop prying on Lesley.

t_ch: 我还有些问题想问你…
t_en: I've got something to ask you.

t_ch: 波少一般喜欢什么类型的奇物？
t_en: What kind of Curio does Master Capote usually prefer?

t_ch: 你这可算是问对人了。能够解答这个问题了，全空间站恐怕只有我世玲一人！
t_en: You're asking the right person. I've gotta be the only person in the space station who can answer this question!

t_ch: 对于波少的爱好，我可是了如指掌。就连他喝咖啡只加三块半的糖，我都铭记于心底。
t_en: I know Master Capote's hobbies like the back of my hand. I even remember he adds three and a half cubes of sugar to his coffee.

t_ch: 至于奇物……咳咳，你可别想套世玲的话！我都说过了，那些奇物是根据规定分发的，不会按照科员的喜好来！
t_en: As for the Curios... Ehem, you think you can fool me into answering this? As I said, the Curios are distributed according to regulations, instead of the researcher's preferences!

t_ch: 应物科都是按照什么规矩分发奇物？
t_en: What is the Department of Implement Arts' regulations in terms of distributing Curios?

t_ch: 这……这关你什么事！空间站有空间站的规矩，应物科也有应物科的准则。
t_en: It's... it's none of your business! The space station has its own rules and regulations, so does our department.

t_ch: 我给波少分发的奇物，那，那可都是走正规流程的。你别多想啊。
t_en: The Curios I distribute to Master Capote are through the normal procedure. Don't think too much about it.

t_ch: 不过，不过应物科工作繁忙，你就算不相信，也别去打听了。省得给我们添麻烦。
t_en: Anyway, the Department of Implement Arts is very busy. Don't ask around even if you don't believe me. Save us some troubles.

t_ch: 哎呀，世玲真是最讨厌你这种刨根问底的新人啦！
t_en: Jeez, I hate newbies like you who always try to get to the bottom of everything!

t_ch: 你也给我整一个奇物呗。
t_en: Give me a Curio, too.

t_ch: 哈！？你知不知道你在说什么话？奇物怎么可能是想要就能给的！
t_en: Huh!? Do you even know what you're talking about? I can't just give a Curio to a random person!

t_ch: 除了波少，谁还可以不走流程就拿到奇物？谁还可以自行挑选奇物？你以为你这样初来乍到的新人，就能拥有波少的学识和水平吗？
t_en: Except for Master Capote, no one gets Curios without going through the normal process. No one gets to choose Curios. You think a newbie like you can match Master Capote's knowledge and standard?

t_ch: 咳咳，世玲的意思是，你的科员等级过低，目前无法申请奇物作为研究。其他的事，你就少打听啦！
t_en: Ehem, I mean, your researcher level is too low. You can't apply for a Curio for your research at the moment. Anything else is none of your business!

t_ch: 我没什么要问的了。
t_en: That's all I have to ask.

t_ch: 哼，总算是问完了。亏世玲还大费周章地给你科普空间站的常识，没想到你倒是想知道更多不该知道的东西！
t_en: Phew, finally. I spent so much effort introducing the basics of the space station to you, but you're interested in things you shouldn't know!

t_ch: 又见面了。这次你也是来放松放松的？正好我旁边有个空位，一起休息一下吧。
t_en: We meet again. Are you here for a vacation this time? Feel free to take the seat next to me and have a break.

t_ch: 我还有一些事情想要问你…
t_en: I've got something to ask you.

t_ch: 你好像并没有因为入侵感到恐慌？
t_en: You don't seem to panic about the invasion?

t_ch: 恐慌？那是胆小鬼才会做的事情吧。我相信空间站有能力处理好这场突发情况。
t_en: Panic? Only cowards do that. I believe the space station is able to deal with this emergency.

t_ch: 更重要的是，正是因为这场入侵，我才能收获满满啊……
t_en: More importantly, I gained a lot from this invasion...

t_ch: 你看，绩效考核会推迟，这就意味着我不用熬夜去思考怎么做汇报了。看你的样子像是新来的，肯定不知道咱们这里的汇报流程有多烦琐……
t_en: Look, the performance review is postponed, which means I don't have to work late thinking about the report. You look like a newbie. You've no idea how cumbersome our reporting process is...

t_ch: 不仅如此，研究课题进度汇报也暂停了。这句话意味着什么，不用我多说了吧？
t_en: Moreover, the research progress report is also suspended. You don't need me to spell it out for you, do you?

t_ch: 综上所述，这场入侵可谓是一把双刃剑！不然我哪儿有时间像这样放松自己，感受生活啊？
t_en: To sum up, this invasion is a double-edged sword! Otherwise, I wouldn't have time to relax and enjoy my life!

t_ch: 说说看你都发现了什么有意思的事情。
t_en: Tell me what interesting discoveries you found.

t_ch: 你算是问对了人。这空间站里的大多数人，都把目光局限于课题研究，而忽视了这里最多的东西……那就是人！
t_en: You are asking the right person. Most people on the space station put too much focus on research. As a result, they neglect the most important thing here... People!

t_ch: 人与人之间的关系，可比搞科研有意思多了。
t_en: The relationship between people is much more interesting than scientific research.

t_ch: 前些日子我就听说有两位同科室的科员好像偷偷确定了恋爱关系……哇，这可是研究室恋爱哦！
t_en: A few days ago, I heard two researchers from the same department started a secret relationship... Hey, this is a love story in a lab!

t_ch: 你怎么一副不感兴趣的样子？难道这还不算有意思的事情么？
t_en: You don't seem very interested. Isn't it interesting to you?

t_ch: 你平时都做什么类型的课题研究？
t_en: What kind of research do you usually do?

t_ch: 拜托，可不可以不要在休息的时候讲工作？
t_en: Oh, come on, can you please not talk about work while I'm taking a break?

t_ch: 什么，你说现在也是工作时间？你这人还真是意料之外的死板。工作时间与非工作时间，难道是被时间表框定的吗？你这样的人很容易在三十岁前发际线就跑到头顶上去的。
t_en: What? Are you saying this is working hours too? You are surprisingly stubborn. Do you think working hours and non-working hours are specified by a timetable? At this rate, your hairline will recede before you turn <unbreak>30</unbreak>.

t_ch: 想聊课题，你随便抓个科员就行了。这种小事就不用来打扰我的休憩快乐了。
t_en: If all you want is to talk about research, just grab any researcher. Don't ruin my joy of slacking off.

t_ch: 我没有什么问题了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 闲聊也是一种休息的方式，如果你有兴趣可以再来找我——只要是和课题研究无关，我都会很乐意聊聊的。
t_en: Chatting is also a way of resting. Come chat with me if you are interested. I'll be very happy to talk about anything as long as it's not about research.

t_ch: 哈欠——困死了。啊…又是你，这次又是什么事？
t_en: *Yawn* I'm so sleepy. You again? What's up?

t_ch: 我有一些问题想要问你…
t_en: I've got something to ask you.

t_ch: 你是医生么？
t_en: Are you a doctor?

t_ch: 我是医疗科的成员乔安。具体负责的工作…或许比医生还杂乱一些。
t_en: I'm Joanne, a member of the Medical Department... My scope of work... may be even more complicated than the doctors'.

t_ch: 有什么身体不舒服的问题可别直接问我，我只负责工作分内的患者，临时偶遇的概不负责。
t_en: Don't come to me if you are not feeling well. I'm only responsible for the patients under my scope of work. I don't take care of any random people I bump into.

t_ch: 你看上去很困。
t_en: You look sleepy.

t_ch: 既然知道就别跟我搭话。打扰一个想打瞌睡的人，比打扰一个正在熟睡的人，是更加恶劣的行为。
t_en: I'm glad you noticed. Stop talking to me then. Disturbing a person who is trying to sleep is even worse than waking up someone who's already asleep.

t_ch: 喂，你这幅不信任又担心的表情是怎么回事？
t_en: Hey, what's that distrustful and concerned look on your face?

t_ch: 我虽然很容易犯困，但工作的时候不会马虎的！你这家伙，该不会把我当成那种会把止血棉落在患者身体里的那种人了吧？！
t_en: Although I easily feel sleepy at work, I take my job very seriously! Don't think of me as some stupid doctor who would leave hemostatic cotton inside their patient!

t_ch: 你看上去很忙。
t_en: You look busy.

t_ch: 既然你能察觉到，那就最好不要来烦我。
t_en: I'm glad you noticed. Then leave me alone.

t_ch: 不是送药就是补药，这种事情分明就该交给机器人吧？
t_en: I am either delivering or going to deliver medicine. They should've assigned this job to a robot, right?

t_ch: 要不是那什么物质军团来捣乱，这种事情才不会交到我手里。
t_en: If it wasn't for the Legion's invasion, this kind of thing wouldn't have become my duty.

t_ch: 真希望站长可以快点修复机器人配送系统啊……
t_en: I wish the lead researcher can fix the robot distribution system as soon as possible.

t_ch: 还是不打扰你了。
t_en: I better leave you alone.

t_ch: 如果有身体不适，千万别去医疗科指名我，我每天可忙着呢。
t_en: If you are not feeling well, do not ask for me in the Medical Department. I am very busy.

t_ch: 小年轻，又见面了。坐坐坐，别见外。
t_en: Kiddo, we meet again. Take a seat.

t_ch: 我想多听听你扯闲篇…
t_en: I want to hear more of your gossip...

t_ch: 有没有什么陈年旧梦的八卦？
t_en: Is there any old gossip?

t_ch: 这个话题我有发言权。
t_en: I am the best qualified to talk about this.

t_ch: 伯纳德你认识吧？就是地概科那个倔老头，一看就不好惹， 眉毛比眼睛都有精神的那个。
t_en: You know Bernard, don't you? The stubborn old guy from the Department of Cosmic Geography who doesn't look very approachable. His eyebrows are fiercer than his eyes.

t_ch: 你别看他现在这么阻挠他徒弟的爱情，当年的他，好家伙，那叫一个多情郎啊。
t_en: Don't be fooled by his seeming determination to prevent his apprentice from dating. You never could've guessed that he used to be quite the womanizer back in his younger days.

t_ch: 年轻的时候吧，这伯纳德情窦初开，想要追密卷科一个姑娘。我们这些做兄弟的能不帮忙吗？那前前后后，忙了好一哆嗦。
t_en: Back when he was young, Bernard fell in love for the first time with a girl from the Department of Insight. As his brothers, we all helped him to pursue her for a while.

t_ch: 这年轻时候的爱情就是炽热，我怀疑伯纳德那老东西，就是在洛奇身上，看到了自个儿年轻时候的影子吧，嘿。
t_en: Young love is always full of passion. I guess Bernard just saw his younger self in Rocky, haha.

t_ch: 啊？你问我之后怎么着了？年轻人，这听八卦可不兴一口气听完。想要知道，就请听下回分解吧！
t_en: What's that? You want to know what happened then? Kiddo, I can't spill all the beans in one go. Stay tuned!

t_ch: 有没有什么难以忘怀的故事？
t_en: Any unforgettable stories?

t_ch: 到了我这把岁数看过去，那啥事都多少有点难以忘怀，你懂这意思吧？
t_en: At my age, everything is unforgettable. You know what I mean?

t_ch: 真不是我说，你们年轻人其实不爱听这句，但我还是得说——没有啥忘不掉的事儿，没有啥过不去的坎儿！真要是有，那就是当时没琢磨明白，当局者迷了！
t_en: I know young people these days hate to hear this, but nothing is truly unforgettable, and there's nothing you can't get over! If there is, it's only because you've been too lost to figure it out!

t_ch: 被你这么一问，我脑子里还真糊涂起来了。一下子好多事儿都冲出来了。真是不能提，不能想啊。
t_en: Now that you brought it up, I am actually confused. I just remembered so many things all at once. The past really doesn't bear being remembered.

t_ch: 什么古恩那家伙年轻的时候风风火火的样子，还有伯纳德刚来的时候那身板才叫一个结实……
t_en: How energetic Gunn used to be... And how strong Bernard was when he first joined us...

t_ch: 哎，物是人非咯！
t_en: *sigh* How things have changed!

t_ch: 你最近都在忙什么呢。
t_en: What have you been working on?

t_ch: 退休之后就不能说自己在忙什么了，一般都说是：最近在玩儿着什么呢。
t_en: I'm retired, so that might not be an accurate question. We normally just say what we've been playing with.

t_ch: 我没啥文化，不像是古恩看得明白愚人戏。我大半辈子都搞机修，和载具称兄道弟，老了也只会折腾点这个。
t_en: I never got a proper education. I wouldn't understand Fool's Play like Gunn does. My life's work has been all about repairing and handling machines and vehicles, and now that I'm old, that's still the only thing I do.

t_ch: 喏，瞧见没，这个小玩具。可别觉得是给小孩儿玩的！这辆装甲车跑过的路，比我喝的酒都多！这个小模型，里头完美复刻了原型的机动轨道呢。
t_en: Here, check this out. Don't think this is some child's plaything! The armored car this miniature model is based on has traveled on more roads than I could count! This model even has a perfect replica of the real thing's mechanized track.

t_ch: 我当年可是修了它足足三次，三次都是从濒死边缘把它救回来……
t_en: I fixed this thing three times. Three times I managed to bring it back from the brink of death ...

t_ch: 哎哟，不说了不说了，都是过去的事儿咯！
t_en: Well, I think I'm done talking. These stories are all water under the bridge.

t_ch: 没什么别的想问了。
t_en: I don't have any other questions.

t_ch: 和你扯闲篇，够劲儿，开心！年轻人，下次有空再来，我老温有的是好酒招待你！
t_en: It was such fun chatting with you. I like it! Kiddo, come here when you have time. I'll treat you to some good wine!

t_ch: 哎，是你啊，来找老头子是有什么事吗？
t_en: Ah, it's you again. How can an old man like me help you?

t_ch: 我还有些问题想问…
t_en: I've got something to ask you.

t_ch: 你认为莱斯莉喜欢洛奇吗？
t_en: Do you think Lesley likes Rocky?

t_ch: 要我说，那就是癞蛤蟆想吃天鹅肉！做梦去吧。
t_en: If you ask me, that can only be his wishful thinking! That can only happen in his dreams!

t_ch: 或许是因为关于那个姑娘的传闻太多，以至于大家都忘记了一个最关键的事实。那就是她自己本身的个人能力，是多么的超凡绝伦。
t_en: Maybe there are so many rumors about that girl that everyone has forgotten one important fact — her individual capacities are simply extraordinary.

t_ch: 莱斯莉不仅仅是一个明星那么简单。她是一个天才学者，是前期的基因与后期的努力共同作用出来的成果，即便是她的妹妹埃美丽，也绝对不会有她的成就。
t_en: Lesley is more than a celebrity. She is a gifted scholar. She's the combined result of her genes and her own efforts. Even her sister Emily won't be able to achieve anything like that.

t_ch: 如果说莱斯莉是百年一遇的天才，那洛奇这小子就是随处可见的科员。
t_en: Lesley is a once-in-a-century genius while Rocky is only an ordinary researcher.

t_ch: 你说说，她会看上他吗？
t_en: Tell me, do you think she'll like him?

t_ch: 你支持他们在一起吗？
t_en: Will you support them being together?

t_ch: 这种话我怎么好评价？你会思考如果自己有幸加入天才俱乐部，要进行什么样子的自我介绍吗？
t_en: How am I supposed to comment on something like that? Would you prepare for an opening speech for the Genius Society? You won't!

t_ch: 那就压根儿是不可能的事儿！
t_en: It's just something impossible!

t_ch: 如果莱斯莉真的回应了洛奇的感情，那洛奇可要加把劲儿。不然两个人的差距太大，生活方式都不同，就算在一起了，以后也会吵架。
t_en: If Lesley really says yes to Rocky, he'll have to work hard. Otherwise, the gap between them will be too big and their lifestyles will be too different. Even if they are together, they will fight a lot.

t_ch: 我人老了，最看不得那种悲欢离别。真要是想长久在一起，洛奇这小子，打铁还需自身硬！
t_en: I'm old. I can't bear to see people break up. If they want to be together in the long run, Rocky will have to toughen up himself!

t_ch: 咳咳…我都说了些什么！那都是空谈，空谈！
t_en: Ahem... Forget what I just said. It's all nonsense! Nonsense!

t_ch: 如何评价这次的入侵。
t_en: How do you evaluate the invasion?

t_ch: 意料之中的事情。无论是入侵，还是能够守住空间站，都不令人意外。
t_en: Expected, both for the invasion itself and the survival of the space station.

t_ch: 任何外部攻击都是难以击垮空间站的，这一点我深信不疑。
t_en: I had no doubt that any external attack will be unable to destroy the space station.

t_ch: 因为我知道，更为严重的症结，并不在于外部的纷扰，而是内部的扭曲。
t_en: Because I know the worse issue lies in internal distortion instead of external disturbance.

t_ch: 要我说，科室之间的矛盾与鄙视链再这没下去，我老头子还没彻底合眼，恐怕就能看见这座空间站的覆灭——因为自己的问题，内部的瓦解！
t_en: If conflicts and contempts continue to exist among different departments, I'm afraid the space station will collapse before I die. Its own issue leads to its internal disintegration!

t_ch: 那我还是不打扰你了。
t_en: I shouldn't keep you.

t_ch: 你也是年轻人，比我这种老头子说话更有感染力。你要是有空，也去劝劝我那个傻徒弟。
t_en: You are a youngster too. Your words are more influential than mine. When you have time, please talk to my student.

t_ch: 哎，真是我的不幸，更是地概科的不幸啊！
t_en: Sigh. It's my misfortune as well as the Department of Cosmic Geography's misfortune!

t_ch: 乖乖小年轻，你在忙什么？有什么事情需要我帮助吗？
t_en: Kiddo, what are you up to? Is there anything I can help you with?

t_ch: 我还有些问题想要问…
t_en: I've got something to ask you.

t_ch: 这场入侵对密卷科影响是最大的吗？
t_en: Does the Department of Insight suffer the most from this invasion?

t_ch: 我不了解其他科室的情况，但是单说密卷科，这场入侵无疑是一场灾难。
t_en: I'm not sure about the other departments. But this invasion is undoubtedly a disaster for us.

t_ch: 我们有大量的资料被摧毁，它们不同于实验材料，可以凭借复刻一次实验就得到数据。里面的许多星神秘闻，是很难有机会再次听闻的……
t_en: A lot of our files were destroyed. Unlike experimental documents, which they can get the data by repeating the experiment, many Aeon mysteries will be lost forever...

t_ch: 之后或许我还需要联络一些密卷科的老同事，一起想办法转录一些材料。只有存放在大脑里的东西，或许才是最长久的吧。
t_en: I may have to contact some ex-colleagues to transcribe some of the files. Things stored in our heads last the longest.

t_ch: 有没有什么我可以帮到你的？
t_en: Is there anything I can help with?

t_ch: 乖孩子，你看上去并不是密卷科的成员。我不能这样随意麻烦你。
t_en: You're such a good kid. You don't look like you are from the Department of Insight. I shouldn't trouble you.

t_ch: 而且现如今人力也还算充足。我还有一些老朋友可以为我提供援助。
t_en: We've got enough people. A few of my old friends are willing to help.

t_ch: 如果等到之后，就连温天翁那个结实的身板都忙得受不了，那我再来麻烦你这位小年轻吧。
t_en: If even someone as strong as Wen Tianweng couldn't handle this, I guess I'll have to seek help from you.

t_ch: 你的时尚品味很赞。
t_en: You have great fashion sense.

t_ch: 哎哟哎哟，说一次就好啦。一直这样夸，我也会不好意思的。
t_en: Oh, I am flattered. I'll be embarrassed if you keep talking like that.

t_ch: 不过你能看出我身上的穿搭风格与妆容安排，想来也是一位关注时尚的小年轻呢。
t_en: However, I guess you are a stylish youngster yourself if you can see my fashion style and my makeup.

t_ch: 每天收拾打扮得称心如意，是我保持活力与开心的秘诀，偷偷分享给你吧。
t_en: Dressing up every day is my secret to staying energetic and happy. This is my secret.

t_ch: 我没什么要问的啦。
t_en: That's all I have to ask.

t_ch: 如果之后有什么问题，可以随时来问我。
t_en: Feel free to come to me if you have any questions.

t_ch: 老板发大财呢~
t_en: Boss is making it big~

t_ch: 你好会上班呀~
t_en: You're killing it at work today~

t_ch: 老板捡到宝了~
t_en: Boss picked up a good one~

t_ch: 老板真厉害呀~
t_en: Boss, you're amazing~

t_ch: 好威风呀~
t_en: Looking mighty impressive~

t_ch: 老板好英明~
t_en: Boss is so smart!

t_ch: 老板真忙呢~
t_en: Boss sure is busy~

t_ch: 老板好认真呀~
t_en: Boss, you're so diligent~

t_ch: 真拼呢~
t_en: Working hard~

t_ch: 老板真有想法呢~
t_en: Boss sure has some interesting ideas~

t_ch: 瑟希斯赐我灵智，驱散愚昧！
t_en: Cerces, bless me with wisdom, and dispel ignorance!

t_ch: …瑟希斯，啊～瑟希斯！你为什么不肯回应我！
t_en: ...Cerces~ Oh, Cerces! Why won't you answer me!?

t_ch: 很不幸…瑟希斯已经殒落了。
t_en: I'm sorry... Cerces has fallen.

t_ch: 我知道，瑟希斯的奥体…已经被天火洞穿，但它会活在每一位学者的思维里！
t_en: I know, Cerces's divine body... has been pierced by heavenly fire... but they will live on in the minds of every scholar!

t_ch: 瑟希斯说它不想再回应你了。
t_en: Cerces says they don't want to respond to you anymore.

t_ch: 瑟希斯真是这么说的？我不信，瑟希斯不会对我不管不顾的。
t_en: Did Cerces really say that? I don't believe it. Cerces wouldn't just abandon me like that.

t_ch: …等等，你就这么自然而然地跟我搭上话了？
t_en: ...Wait, did you just casually strike up a conversation with me like that?

t_ch: 你是谁？请支持安提西尼！
t_en: Who are you? Please support Antisthenes!

t_ch: 支持…安提西尼…？
t_en: Support... Antisthenes...?

t_ch: 是的，安提西尼是我的名字，现在正需要你的支持。
t_en: Yes, Antisthenes is my name, and I need your support right now.

t_ch: 我是…{NICKNAME}，你认识我吗？
t_en: I'm... {NICKNAME}. Do you know me?

t_ch: 不，我不认识你。但是！现在我们认识了彼此，请支持安提西尼！
t_en: No, I don't know you. But hey! Now that we've met, please support Antisthenes!

t_ch: 实不相瞒，我是绳结学派延毕数十年的老学生，按理来说，世界将行至尽头，我一个老学生毕业不毕业，又会怎么样呢？
t_en: To be honest, I'm a decades-long senior student at the Nodist School who's been putting off graduation. At this point, with the world coming to an end and all, does it even matter if an old student like me graduates or not?

t_ch: 但是不行！我的梦想从「成为树庭七贤人」，不断降级成了「成为教授」、「成为助教」、「成为学者」…现在已是「顺利毕业」了。
t_en: But that won't do! My dream has been constantly compromised from "becoming one of the Seven Sages of the Grove" to "becoming a professor," then "becoming a teaching assistant," then "becoming a scholar"... and now it's just "graduating successfully."

t_ch: 为了这个梦想，我已经奋斗了多年，而现在…你告诉我，瑟希斯没了，学者们也跑了，我的梦想不能实现了？
t_en: I've been chasing this dream for years, and now... you're telling me that Cerces is gone, the scholars have fled, and my dream can't come true?

t_ch: 不行，就算世界末日也不能阻止我！我必须毕业！这需要你的支持……
t_en: No way. Not even the apocalypse can stop me! I must graduate! I need your support...

t_ch: 一瞬间，安提西尼仿佛看见了你曾经无数次被类似的「小请求」折磨的日常。
t_en: For a moment, Antisthenes seems to see how your everyday life has been tortured countless times by similar "small requests."

t_ch: 唉…陪我聊聊天就好，安慰我的心，这就是对安提西尼最好的支持！
t_en: *sigh* Just chat with me for a bit and comfort me... That's the best way to support Antisthenes!

t_ch: 瑟希斯赐我灵智，驱散愚昧！瑟希斯请保佑我的毕业论文抵御灵水的浸泡！
t_en: May Cerces grant me wisdom and dispel my ignorance! Cerces, please protect my thesis from the deluge of spirit water!

t_ch: 你来了，陪我说说话吧……
t_en: You're here. Let's chat for a bit...

t_ch: 当然，我们聊点什么吧…
t_en: Of course. Let's chat...

t_ch: 你真是太贴心了，我愿意将你称为「救世主」。
t_en: You're so thoughtful. I'd gladly call you my "Deliverer."

t_ch: 你为什么要回到神悟树庭？
t_en: Why did you go back to the Grove of Epiphany?

t_ch: 因为，我的毕业论文就在这里。
t_en: Because my thesis is right here.

t_ch: 准确地说，我的毕业论文就在神悟树庭的水里。
t_en: To be precise, my thesis is in the waters of the Grove of Epiphany.

t_ch: …已经泡了有很长一段时间了，我现在还没有找到。
t_en: ...It's been soaking in it for quite a while now, and I still haven't found it.
Uhh...
Hmm...

t_ch: …别说什么「放弃吧」、「不如重新再写一份」之类的话。
t_en: ...Please don't tell me to "just give up" or "why don't you start over."

t_ch: 我既然不顾死活地回到了神悟树庭，我的精神状态肯定也异于常人！
t_en: If I'm crazy enough to come back to the Grove of Epiphany despite the risks, my mental state must fall outside what's considered normal!

t_ch: 你就不要劝我了，我必须完成它！谁也阻止不了我，瑟希斯也不行！
t_en: Don't try to talk me out of it. I must finish this! No one can stop me, not even Cerces!

t_ch: …加油。
t_en: ...Good luck.

t_ch: …你都这样了，肯定能毕业。
t_en: ...With all that work you've put in, you'll definitely graduate.

t_ch: 借你吉言。
t_en: Thanks for your blessing. I'm counting on it.

t_ch: 感觉世界末日的毕业没必要吧？
t_en: Is an apocalyptic graduation really necessary?

t_ch: 按照通常社会人的观念来看，的确如此。
t_en: From a typical working adult's perspective, that's definitely true.

t_ch: 但是你不应该用世人的目光来考量我，毕竟我…精神状态不太好。
t_en: But you shouldn't judge me by normal standards. After all... I'm not exactly in the best mental state.

t_ch: 不过，就算明天世界要毁灭了，我也得给自己找个要完成的事情来做。如果我现在回到家，瘫坐在那里，什么都不做，末日也不会有改变……
t_en: Still, even if the world's gonna end tomorrow, I need to find something to keep myself busy. If I just go home and slump there doing nothing, it's not gonna change doomsday anyway...

t_ch: 但如果我能完成自己的学术报告，我能毕业，至少我会不一样。
t_en: But if I can finish my academic report, I can graduate, and at least that'll make me different.

t_ch: 改变世界前，我能改变我自己。
t_en: Before changing the world, I can change myself.

t_ch: 对于我来说，这就是有意义的。
t_en: For me, that's something with a purpose.

t_ch: 那么…需要我帮你找找吗？
t_en: So... want me to help you look for it?

t_ch: 不必了，我能看得出来，你经常收到各式各样的「小请求」。而且，你心地善良，有求必应，只要我开口请求，你肯定能帮到我……
t_en: No need. I can tell you get all sorts of "little requests" asked of you. And with your kind heart, always ready to help, I'm sure you'd lend me a hand if I just asked...

t_ch: 不过！我不会开口的。我改变不了神悟树庭的现状，我改变不了翁法罗斯…我能改变的，只有我自己，让自己不要轻易依赖别人——
t_en: But I won't say a word! I can't change the state of the Grove of Epiphany and I can't change Amphoreus... What I can change is only myself, to stop relying on others so easily...

t_ch: 你在忙着拯救这个世界，我不应该在此时此刻请求你帮我找一篇论文。
t_en: You're busy saving the world. I shouldn't be asking you to help me find a thesis paper right now.

t_ch: 我自己能拯救我的论文，别担心我。你，要去拯救世界。
t_en: I can save my thesis on my own. Don't worry about me. Go forth, and save the world.

t_ch: 就聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's it for now.

t_ch: 当然，我也该去准备下潜到灵水里了，希望我能找到我的论文。
t_en: Well, I should get ready to dive into the spirit water, too. Hope I can find my thesis.

t_ch: 就聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's it for now.

t_ch: 当然，我也该去准备下潜到灵水里了，希望我能找到我的论文。
t_en: Well, I should get ready to dive into the spirit water too. Hope I can find my thesis.

t_ch: 嗷呜～奇拉拉现在又该何去何从呢？
t_en: Awoo~ Where should Chirara go from here?

t_ch: 我跟随了荒笛大人太久，现在突然让我自己决定方向，我不知道该去哪里了……
t_en: I've followed Lord Terravox for so long. Now that I suddenly have to decide my own path, I don't know where to go...

t_ch: …你是在问我吗？
t_en: ...Are you asking me?

t_ch: 不，我只是在自言自语而已…突如其来的自由，让我有些不知所措。
t_en: No, I'm just talking to myself... This sudden freedom has me a bit lost.

t_ch: 前路还得自己找。
t_en: We'll have to find our own way forward.

t_ch: 我明白，没人知道我应该去向哪里…除了我自己，尽管我现在也不太明白。
t_en: I get it. No one knows where I should go... except for myself, though I'm not too sure about that right now either.

t_ch: 嗷呜…多亏丹恒大人将神悟树庭固定住，如今我们也重新有了立足之地。但仅仅有立足之地是不够的，我想出发，做点什么，就像荒笛大人那样……
t_en: Awoo... Thanks to Lord Dan Heng for stabilizing the Grove of Epiphany, we finally have a place to live again. But just having a foothold isn't enough. I want to set out and do something, just like Lord Terravox...

t_ch: 荒笛大人教会了我很多事情…现在想来，那都是为了有一天我能迈向自己的旅行。也许还需要一些时间，我就能够做到了。
t_en: Lord Terravox taught me many things... Looking back now, it was all to prepare me for the day I could embark on my own journey. Perhaps with a bit more time, I'll be ready.

t_ch: 嗷呜～我还会在树庭待一段时间，如果你也有些迷茫，不如和我一起停下来。我记得不少荒笛大人的故事，我可以讲给你听～
t_en: Awoo~ I'll be staying in the Grove for a while. If you're feeling a bit lost too, why not take a breather here with me? I remember quite a few stories about Lord Terravox, and I'd love to share them with you~

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜～在出发之前，我暂时打算在树庭停留一段时间。我还记得不少荒笛大人的故事，你如果想听的话……
t_en: Awoo awoo~ Before setting off, I plan to stay at the Grove for a while. I still remember quite a few stories about Lord Terravox, if you'd like to hear them...

t_ch: 来聊聊吧…奇拉拉。
t_en: Let's have a chat... Chirara.

t_ch: 当然，如果只要你不觉得枯燥就好～
t_en: Of course, as long as you don't find it boring~

t_ch: 讲讲你和荒笛的相遇吧…
t_en: Tell me about how you met Terravox...

t_ch: 嗷呜…其实说来很简单，我掉进了一个洞里。
t_en: Awoo... Actually, it's pretty simple. I fell into a hole.

t_ch: 在大地的裂缝中，我滚落到了一个什么也看不清的洞穴里…四周都是坚硬的墙壁，前后则是万丈深渊，我只能杵在原地，一动不动……
t_en: I tumbled through a fissure in the earth into a pitch-black cave... Solid walls surrounded me on both sides, with bottomless abysses ahead and behind. I could only stand there, frozen in place...

t_ch: 嗷呜～我又困又饿，没有同伴能发现我在哪里，我以为自己彻底没救了。
t_en: Awoooo~ I was tired and hungry, with no companions who could find me. I thought I was completely done for.

t_ch: 但是那个时候我听到了一个声音，那是在无穷远方的地心里，荒笛大人传来的引导…它能与大地上的所有生灵心意相通。
t_en: But at that moment, I heard a voice coming from the infinite depths of the world's core, it was the guidance from Lord Terravox... It could connect with the hearts of all living beings on Earth.

t_ch: 它听见了我的呼救，但它并不能帮助我离开洞穴——我已经陷入大地深处，那是再也不能回头的深处。
t_en: My cry for help was heard, but the voice couldn't help me escape the cave. I was trapped deep beneath the land, in depths from which there was no return.

t_ch: 「翁法罗斯的所有故事，通常都可以看作是『掉入洞穴』之中，而那些故事的结尾要么是『逃离洞穴』，或是『死在洞穴』之中……」
t_en: "All Amphorean stories can typically be seen as 'falling into caves,' ending with either 'escaping from the cave' or 'dying in the cave'..."

t_ch: 「但是『在洞穴中生活下去』又何尝不是一种选择呢？来吧，我会引导你来到我身边，你不会走投无路的。」
t_en: "But hey, 'living in a cave' is a valid choice too, right? Come on, I'll guide you to my side. You won't be left with nowhere to go."

t_ch: 嗷呜…于是，荒笛大人耐心地引导着我走过无数黑暗，来到它沉眠的深处。
t_en: Awoo... And so, Lord Terravox patiently guided me through countless shadows to reach the depths of their slumber.

t_ch: 荒笛是…怎样的半神呢？
t_en: What kind of demigod is Terravox...?

t_ch: 嗷呜～荒笛大人沉默的时光都太长了，它开口说话的时刻都弥足珍贵。
t_en: Awoo~ Lord Terravox often remains silent, so much so that every moment they speak is absolutely precious.

t_ch: 曾经有一只蝾螈问过荒笛大人有关战争的回忆，尤其是举戈向吉奥里亚的时刻，那是它生命中最重要的一次「反叛」。
t_en: Once, a salamander asked Lord Terravox about their memories of war, especially the moment when they raised arms against Georios. That was the most important "rebellion" in their life.

t_ch: 我还记得那时荒笛大人的目光，胜过了千言万语，像是糅进了千年时光里所有的情感——它并不后悔自己的选择，但那一天也永远改变了它。
t_en: I still remember Lord Terravox's gaze back then. It was a gaze that relayed beyond a thousand words, one that contained all the emotions accumulated over a millennium. They didn't regret their choice, but that day changed them forever.

t_ch: 「只要走在前进的道路上，就意味着不停与身后告别。孩子们，我走在引领大地上所有生灵的道路上，不能停下来。」
t_en: "To walk the path of progress means constantly bidding farewell to what remains behind. My children, I walk on the path of guiding all living beings on Earth, and I cannot stop."

t_ch: 荒笛大人接受了与生俱来的使命，便是为吉奥里亚引领大地众生，它可以为此舍弃一切…即便那是战友，即便那是自己。
t_en: Lord Terravox embraced their destined duty: to guide all living beings for Georios. They would sacrifice everything for this cause... be it their comrades, or even themself.

t_ch: 所以，它将一切托付给了丹恒。
t_en: So, they entrusted everything to Dan Heng.

t_ch: 我能感受到来自大地的坚韧。
t_en: I can feel the tenacity of the Earth.

t_ch: 嗷呜…即便那意味着舍弃那与生俱来的使命，它也绝无后悔。
t_en: Awoo... Even if it meant abandoning their innate duty, they had absolutely no regrets.

t_ch: 你接下来有什么打算呢？
t_en: What are your plans from here?

t_ch: 嗷呜…我也不清楚，我一直跟着荒笛大人的身后，它迈起脚步，我也迈起脚步…如今它已经离开了，我反而不知道该怎么走了。
t_en: Awoo... I'm not really sure. I've always just followed Lord Terravox. When they took a step, I took one too... Now that they're gone, I don't know where to go.

t_ch: 跟着丹恒走吧，他会引领你们。
t_en: Follow Dan Heng, he will guide all of you.

t_ch: 丹恒大人已接过荒笛大人的使命，他会将我们带往星空…荒笛大人曾说过，星空是另一片大地，我很期待那片大地。
t_en: Lord Dan Heng has inherited Lord Terravox's duty. He will lead us to the stars... Lord Terravox once said that the stars form another world, and I'm looking forward to seeing that world.

t_ch: 不过在出发之前，我不想再随波逐流了。否则，荒笛大人教会我的一切有关前进的哲理，只会在我心里停滞不前。
t_en: But before setting out, I don't want to ride with the waves anymore. Otherwise, all the wisdom about moving forward that Lord Terravox taught me would only stagnate within my heart.

t_ch: 你有足够的时间来停留思考。
t_en: You have enough time to stop and reflect.

t_ch: 荒笛大人说过，行走的诀窍，便是不能只是低头注视着大地前进，我们还需要停下来并抬起头，确认前进的方向。
t_en: Lord Terravox once said, the key to walking isn't just keeping your head down and watching the ground as you move forward. We need to stop and look up to make sure we're heading in the right direction.

t_ch: 谢谢你的建议，我明白，停下是为了更好地前进。
t_en: Thanks for your advice. I get it, sometimes you need to take a step back to move forward.

t_ch: …我会和留在树庭的同伴们好好聊聊，我们将去往何方。
t_en: ...I'll have a good talk with my companions who stayed in the Grove about where we should go next.

t_ch: 暂时就聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's it for now.

t_ch: 荒笛大人说真正的引领是「让大地的生灵们各行其是」，我想，终有一天，大地会回应荒笛大人的理想吧。
t_en: Lord Terravox says true leadership means "letting all beings of the land follow their own path." I believe that one day, the land will respond to Lord Terravox's ideals.

t_ch: 暂时就聊到这里吧。
t_en: That's it for now.

t_ch: 荒笛大人说真正的引领是「让大地的生灵们各行其是」，我想，终有一天，大地会回应荒笛大人的理想吧。
t_en: Lord Terravox says true leadership means "letting all beings of the land follow their own path." I believe that one day, the land will respond to Lord Terravox's ideals.

t_ch: 你可算来了，我快要被水流冲下高台了喀！
t_en: Finally, you're here! I was about to get swept off this platform, crrk!

t_ch: 为什么要待在水里…
t_en: Why stay in the water...

t_ch: 爬上来不就行了？
t_en: Why don't you just climb up here?

t_ch: 你没看见吗？我们之间已经隔了一层{RUBY_B#空气墙}可悲的厚障壁{RUBY_E#}了喀…
t_en: Can't you see? There's already a {RUBY_B#invisible wall}pathetic thick barrier{RUBY_E#} between us, crrk...

t_ch: 你可算来了，我快要被水流冲下高台了喀！
t_en: Finally, you're here! I was about to get swept off this platform, crrk!

t_en: Why stay in the water...

t_en: Can't you see? There's already a {RUBY_B#invisible wall}pathetic thick barrier{RUBY_E#} between us, crrk...

t_ch: 那时候我的身体毫无预兆地抽搐了一下，从树上掉了下来，刚好就避开了那道金光。差点我就没命了喀！
t_en: My body suddenly twitched without warning and pulled me from the tree, just barely dodging that golden beam. Phew, I almost bit the dust there, crrk!

t_ch: 难道这就是若虫一生一次的闪现吗？
t_en: Could this be the one-time flash of a nymph's lifetime?

t_ch: 原本我是屹立于大地之上的，不知道什么时候就飞起来了…好像是脚底下的石头变透明了喀！
t_en: I was standing firmly on the ground, then suddenly I was floating... I think the stones under my feet turned transparent, crrk!

t_ch: 不过为什么透明的石头也有建模呢？
t_en: But why does a transparent stone even have a 3D model?

t_ch: 为了她，我已经抵达了旅途的尽头。只需要爬上这棵树，我就能见到她了！
t_en: For her, I've reached the end of my journey. Once I climb this tree, I'll finally be able to see them!

t_ch: 这条路很长，但她的信徒，绝不会因此放弃！
t_en: The road ahead is long, but their followers will never give up because of it!

t_ch: 我说的「她」是吾主瑟希斯喀。
t_en: When I say "them," I mean our master, Cerces, crrk.

t_ch: 我观这洞中异象，想来是有修者在此突破。不知是我虫族的年轻天骄还是那人族的惊才绝艳之辈…
t_en: Looking at these strange phenomena in the cave, I suspect someone must have ascended here. Could it be one of our young prodigies from the nymphs, or perhaps one of those brilliant human talents...

t_ch: 若是人族，此子断不可留！
t_en: If they're human, this child must not be let live!

t_ch: 这就是我家大大瑟希斯的雕像，无论从哪个角度看都好漂亮、好完美…
t_en: This is the statue of my beloved Cerces, it's so beautiful and perfect from every angle...

t_ch: 裂分之枝神颜盖世！裂分之枝智慧无双！
t_en: The Bough of Rift's divine beauty is unmatched! The Bough of Rift's wisdom is unparalleled!

t_ch: 你那个角度能看到脸吗？
t_en: Can you see their face from that angle?

t_ch: 好像的确看不到…
t_en: Yeah, I can't seem to see it...

t_ch: 不对，你骗虫！这个雕像本来就没有脸喀！
t_en: No way, you're buggin'! This statue never had a face to begin with, crrk!

t_ch: 若虫也这么肉麻？
t_en: Are nymphs this cheesy too?

t_ch: 对于人类来说或许有些超前，但对于本虫来说刚刚好喀！
t_en: It might be a bit ahead of its time for humans, but it's just perfect for this nymph, crrk!

t_ch: 天呐，过路的旅者，你怎么在天花板上喀！
t_en: Holy moly, traveler, what are you doing stuck on the ceiling, crrk!?

t_ch: 还是说，其实是我在天花板上？真是难理解喀…
t_en: Or wait... am I actually on the ceiling? This is so confusing, crrk...

t_ch: 只要我躲在阴暗的角落，一定不会有人发现的！
t_en: As long as I hide in this dark corner, no one will ever find me!

t_ch: 啊…你是怎么找到我的？
t_en: Ah... how did you find me?

t_ch: 你的气泡太吵了，很难不发现。
t_en: Your speech bubble is so noisy, it's hard not to notice.

t_ch: 可恶，被天外的力量制裁了喀！
t_en: Drats, I've been punished by forces from beyond the sky, crrk!

t_ch: 车票在震动，附近一定有若虫。
t_en: The boarding pass is vibrating, there must be a nymph nearby.

t_ch: 藏在这里也能发现吗…你这家伙，不和你玩了喀。
t_en: You can find me even in this place... That's it, I'm done playing with you, crrk.

t_ch: 想我一生四方偷盗，最后竟被洪水堵住了去路…
t_en: After a lifetime of stealing from all corners of the world, who'd have thought a flood would be what finally stops me in my tracks...

t_ch: 你真去过很多地方吗？
t_en: Have you really been to many places?

t_ch: 呃…我爬到过箱面上的北方，南方，东方和西方…也算四方吧。
t_en: Uh... I've crawled to the north, south, east, and west sides of the box... That counts as "all corners," right?

t_ch: 你偷过什么东西？
t_en: What have you ever stolen?

t_ch: 嗯…大地兽的武器、人类的角和奇美拉的鳞片！
t_en: Hmm... dromas' weapons, human horns, and chimera scales!

t_ch: 不对，你是谁，为什么会出现在这里？
t_en: Hold up, who are you and what are you doing here?

t_ch: 哦，原来是道上的同行喀！
t_en: Oh, so you're a fellow practitioner, crrk!

t_ch: 噢，我的瑟希斯啊，我从没有见过那样大的洞，这太惊虫了…
t_en: Oh my Cerces, I've never seen a hole that big before, this is absolutely bug-tastic...

t_ch: 简直比那{RUBY_B#扎格列斯}两面窃贼{RUBY_E#}的胃袋还要深邃喀。
t_en: It's even deeper than that {RUBY_B#Zagreus}double-crosser{RUBY_E#}'s bottomless pit of a stomach, crrk.

t_ch: 这个通道看上去就令虫晕眩…这个洞的设计者一定充满了恶意喀！
t_en: Just one look at this passage makes me dizzy... Whosoever designed this cave must've had serious ill intentions, crrk!

t_ch: 不过，如果这个洞是设计给虫的…
t_en: But if this hole was designed for bugs...

t_ch: 那就合理了——穿越虫洞本来就会晕晕的喀！
t_en: Then it makes sense. You'll get dizzy passing through a bughole anyway, crrk!

t_ch: 我也想和那只大地兽一样站在房顶上，那里的风景一定很好…
t_en: I'd love to stand on the roof like that dromas. The scenery there must be amazing...

t_ch: 但我可不想成为压倒屋顶的最后一只若虫喀！
t_en: But I don't want to be the last nymph that broke the rooftop, crrk.

t_ch: 冰冷的心脏变成了温暖的水资源喀！
t_en: This cold heart has been turned to the warmest water, crrk!

t_ch: 好口渴，我究竟喝不喝呢…喝了对不起{RUBY_B#墨涅塔}太太{RUBY_E#}，不喝对不起我自己。
t_en: So thirsty... Should I drink it or not...? If I drink, I'll feel bad about the {RUBY_B#Mnestia}old lady{RUBY_E#}. If I don't, I'll feel bad for myself.

t_ch: 真是难选喀！
t_en: What a hard choice, crrk!

t_ch: 水车为什么会坏掉？一定是有虫故意让我上不去，想要逼我绕远路…
t_en: Why did the water wheel break? There must be a bug who is intentionally keeping me from getting up there, trying to force me to take the long way around...

t_ch: 又被做局了喀！
t_en: In a bind again, crrk!

t_ch: 心脏爆炸了，世界就毁灭了！
t_en: The heart's exploding! The world is ending!

t_ch: 你想，一旦心之壁破裂，所有虫的灵魂就会溶解在黄色的液体中，不分彼此…
t_en: Think about it. Once the walls of the heart crumble, all the nymphs' spirits will be dissolved in the yellow fluid, leaving no separation between anything...

t_ch: 诶，好像也不是不行喀。
t_en: Hm. It's not like it's that bad, crrk...

t_ch: 想到那边近距离看看树上那条龙，可我自己没法使用这个{RUBY_B#雅努斯密径}传送装置{RUBY_E#}…
t_en: I want to get a closer look at the dragon on the tree, but I can't use this {RUBY_B#Janus's Hidden Passage}teleporter{RUBY_E#} myself...

t_ch: 因为我没有手指，旋转不了图标喀！
t_en: Because I don't have fingers, so I can't turn the puzzle, crrk!

t_ch: 你知道吗？每有一个人升降水面，就会有一只怕水的虫受到伤害。
t_en: Did you know that every time someone ascends to the surface of the water, a hydrophobic nymph will get hurt?

t_ch: 可你不在乎，你只关心你自己喀。
t_en: But you don't care. You only care about yourself, crrk.

t_ch: 神识之蝶啊，你告诉我，我是这个世界上最漂亮的若虫吗？
t_en: O Butterfly of Divine Mind, tell me, am I the prettiest nymph on this world?

t_ch: 用户未评价，本虫默认好评。看来我就是最美的喀！
t_en: Unable to find user comment. Recording the best rating by default. Looks like I'm the most beautiful after all, crrk!

t_ch: 我正在进行不踩红色地块的挑战。
t_en: I'm doing the no-stepping-on-red-tiles challenge.

t_ch: 不许说我幼稚…踩到燃烧的地面是真的很烫喀！
t_en: Don't call me naive... The floor is literally lava, crrk!

t_ch: 我一直在寻觅虫生的意义，最后终于明白自己活着是为了什么。
t_en: I have long been searching for the meaning of life as a nymph. I finally figured out for what reason I live...

t_ch: 所以我长久地等候在此处，不为别的…
t_en: That's why I waited here for so long, for nothing else...

t_ch: 只为等候你将我寻得喀。
t_en: Just waiting for you to find me, crrk.

t_ch: 来虫呐，快救救我喀！
t_en: Come on, nymphs! Save me already, crrk!

t_ch: 只抽了一下，就出金了…
t_en: Just one pull, and I was almost gonna be golden...

t_ch: 这是飞一样的感觉…
t_en: This feels like flying...

t_ch: 冲树…冲树…
t_en: Charging at the tree... charging at the tree...

t_ch: 好强的威压…
t_en: What strong presence...

t_en: Great Cerces, we love and respect you, crrk!

t_en: No one would notice I was slacking off!

t_en: Is this a number, or...?

t_ch: 这只若虫的触角努力探出，似乎也想变成贼灵…
t_en: The nymph's antennae stretch out eagerly, like it wants to be a Spirithief too...

t_ch: 一直充电可真舒服
t_en: Charging up like this feels so good

t_ch: 但我有些担心…

t_ch: 其实可以穷举，但我不建议…
t_en: We could brute-force it, but I wouldn't recommend it...

t_ch: 这只若虫发出奇怪的声音，恍若泰坦的低语——当然，也可能是它出故障了。
t_en: The nymph let out a strange noise. It almost sounded like a Titan whispering. Or maybe it was just broken.

t_ch: 应该就是这里了…怎样才算「供奉无限」呢？
t_en: This should be the place... What exactly counts as "Offer Infinity" anyway?

t_ch: 「戈矛回到了主人之手」…或许它的密钥也是？
t_en: "The Spear returns to its master's hand"... perhaps its encryption key does too?

t_ch: 「扎格列斯身无分文」，那它的密钥……
t_en: "Zagreus is without a penny to their name," so its encryption key...

t_ch: 这是瑟希斯的符文…谁会投入它的怀抱？
t_en: This is Cerces' rune... who will fall into its embrace?

t_ch: 塞纳托斯…是谁被灰黯的手掌托住？
t_en: Thanatos... who is being held by those dark, gray hands?

t_ch: 这座人台静静地伫立在道路一侧，不发一言。或许它的核心遭到了毁坏，或许它的智慧已经消褪，又或许它早已忘却了自己的使命。

t_ch: 怎么办？我的学术数据…
t_en: What should I do? My research data...

t_ch: 千万不能被「注水」啊！
t_en: Don't let them water it down!

t_ch: 恭迎伟大的{NICKNAME}回到了{F#她}{M#他}打卡过的王座！你曾在这里与凯撒旗下的众爵把酒畅饮，也曾目睹了一只捷足猫的妙计、一位学者的孤心筹谋……
t_en: Welcome back, great {NICKNAME}, to the throne where you once sat! Here you shared drinks with the nobles under the Imperator's banner, witnessed the clever schemes of a nimble cat, and the lonely plots of a scholar...

t_ch: 王座上灰烬的余温提醒你，「毁灭」的金血烧尽了过往种种，那些同伴存在的「记忆」如今只在你的脑海里根植。
t_en: The lingering warmth of ashes on the throne reminds you: the golden blood of "Destruction" has burned away all that came before, and those "memories" of your companions now only exist deeply rooted in your mind.

t_ch: 在这黄金之树的幽影下，你像一位真正的哲人王，沉思了片刻——谁说世界的核心一定藏在智慧之树的顶端？不妨沿着枝脉向下而行吧。
t_en: Under the shadows of the golden tree, you paused like a true Philosopher King in contemplation. Who says the world's core must lie at the crown of the Tree of Wisdom? Perhaps it's worth following the branches downward instead.

t_ch: 神识之蝶栖息在原地，无声亦无息。
t_en: The Butterfly of Divine Mind perches motionlessly, making neither sound nor breath.

t_ch: 无论「毁灭」如何影响整座树庭，它始终是「理性」火种的一道保险。
t_en: No matter how the Destruction affects the entire Grove, the Grove remains an insurance for the Coreflame of Reason.

t_ch: 它考验世人的「纯粹无私之爱」，以明验觐见瑟希斯的决心。而最为「纯粹无私之爱」，已显诸其身，在这份漫长的守护里无声延续。
t_en: It tests humanity's "pure, selfless love" to verify their determination to meet Cerces. And the most "pure, selfless love" has already manifested itself, silently continuing in this long-lasting protection.

t_ch: 绘有瑟希斯枝叶的彩窗。它们曾是夜帷的深蓝，如今是烈阳的金黄。这，就叫做「玻璃」二象性。
t_en: A stained-glass window adorned with Cerces foliage. Once midnight blue like the night's veil, now golden yellow like the blazing sun. This is what we call the "duality of glass."
